name: cluster-watchdog-daily
prompt: Run your daily cluster health check

name: daily-blog-scrape
prompt: Scrape all target engineering blogs for new articles published in the last 3 days. Save new articles to Memex vault 'inbox' with proper titles, tags, and assets.

name: sorting-hat-periodic
prompt: Check the inbox vault for unrouted notes. Route each to the appropriate vault based on its metadata.

name: weekly-digest
prompt: Send a weekly digest email of changed Memex notes to <REDACTED_EMAIL>. Search for notes modified in the past 7 days using memex_list_notes with after set to 7 days ago. Group them by vault. For each note, include the title and a one-line description. Send as an email with subject 'Memex Weekly Digest — {date}'. Keep it concise.

name: insight-linker-daily
prompt: Search Memex for recent insights and open GitHub issues or PRs for applicable improvements to target repositories.

name: trader-advisor-briefing
prompt: Produce the daily pre-market briefing. Execute Phase 0 (bootstrap), Phase 1 (briefing with price fetch, news scan, and market-analyst adversarial analysis), and Phase 3 (persist dashboard metrics). Deliver via channel_send(channel='telegram', recipient='<REDACTED_TELEGRAM_USER_ID>'). Do NOT use telegram_send.

name: trader-advisor-trail-check
prompt: Today is a TRAILING STOP REVIEW day (Monday or Thursday). Execute Phase 0 (bootstrap), then Phase 1 (full briefing). CRITICAL ADDITION: after fetching prices, run the Trailing Stop Discipline check for EVERY open position. Compute new_stop = current_price * (1 - trail%). If new_stop > existing_stop, produce an updated Stop Limit BRIEF ticket. This is mandatory on Mon/Thu per Rule 8. Then complete the briefing as normal and deliver via channel_send(channel='telegram', recipient='<REDACTED_TELEGRAM_USER_ID>'). Do NOT use telegram_send.

name: trader-advisor-stop-alert
prompt: STOP PRESSURE CHECK — this is NOT a full briefing. Read MASTER from KV. Fetch current prices for all open positions using price_get_quotes. For each position: if the current price is within 2% of the stop price, send alert via channel_send(channel='telegram', recipient='<REDACTED_TELEGRAM_USER_ID>'): '⚠️ STOP PRESSURE: {instrument} at {price} — stop at {stop} ({distance}%). Review immediately.' If no position is under pressure, do nothing — do NOT send a Telegram message. Update KV key app:openfang:trader-advisor:positions_under_stop_pressure with the current count.

name: trend-scout-weekly
prompt: Run your weekly opportunity scan. Execute Phase 0 (load current exposure), Phase 1 (broad scan across all categories), Phase 2 (filter for accessibility, overlap, catalyst clarity, risk/reward), Phase 3 (score each via market-analyst), Phase 4 (compose and deliver via channel_send to telegram, NOT telegram_send), Phase 5 (persist state). Only surface BUY or STRONG_BUY opportunities.
